note: Real util/ source, fetched at the pinned commit by harness/fetch_vendored.py into corpus/.cache/ (never checked in). files maps upstream path -> app-relative destination. Pinned right before SponsorData's 2023 GraphQL-parsing fixes and before VideoInfo's cumulative 2023-2024 field growth, so edits/01-03 apply as clean forward patches (edit03 is intentionally a larger cumulative diff -- pin-to-commit across ~11 months of real, unsquashed VideoInfo.kt history, not a single PR -- see its meta.json). DateTimeUtil.kt (candidates-doc pick) was excluded: it did not exist yet at any pin early enough to precede real edits on SponsorData/VideoInfo without those edits being already baked into HEAD; kept the subgraph to the two files where a clean pin-before-edit story held.
